---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a governance or RFC process improvement
title: "[proposal] "
labels: proposal
---

## Problem

What part of the current RFC process needs improvement?

## Proposed Change

Describe the governance or process change.

## Impact

Who would be affected? How does this improve the proposal workflow?

## RFC Needed?

Is this a meta-change to the RFC process itself? If yes, open this as a PR with an updated template or process document.
